## Summary

Senior software engineer with 5 years building backend services for B2B SaaS. Strong Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, and AWS experience. Focus on reliable APIs, observability, and pragmatic delivery.

## Experience

### Senior Backend Engineer — Northwind Analytics (2021–Present)

- Designed and shipped FastAPI microservices handling 4M+ API calls/day with PostgreSQL and Redis.
- Led migration from synchronous workers to async SQLAlchemy + asyncpg with structured logging.
- Built CI/CD on GitHub Actions; Dockerized services deployed on AWS ECS Fargate.
- Partnered with ML team to expose model inference endpoints with rate limiting and cost tracking.

### Software Engineer — BrightLedger (2019–2021)

- Maintained Django REST APIs and PostgreSQL schemas; improved query performance by 35%.
- Implemented OAuth2 client integrations and webhook receivers for accounting partners.
